creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please perform the following:

1. Rename the security/krb5 port to security/krb5-16.
2. Repocopy security/krb5-17 top security/krb5.

The reason for this is that krb5-16 and krb5-17 will not build with
OpenSSL 1.0.0 whereas krb5 1.8 will.

I do want to use the krb5-17 port as the basis to implement KRB5 1.8.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: N/A
